given: Stock records are displayed in the table
then: Each row displays columns for SKU, location, quantity, and inventory tracking code (inventory_code) with values from the record
architectural_notes: Column projection (SKU, location, quantity, inventory_code) is a presentation concern owned by the boundary/template (app/routes/), reading fields off the model carried up from the repository via the service. E2E: asserts each column's value matches the seeded record. An optional field that is absent renders an explicit 'not tracked' rather than null-crashing (NFR-F1-6, usability preference); no field is computed in the template.

independence.rationale: Specifies which columns and data fields are visible in the table, distinct from AC1 (table exists) and AC2 (organization by location); a table could exist and be organized without showing all required columns.
